prompt: Lead the development of an enterprise AI safety and governance program for an aerospace company deploying autonomous flight control AI across commercial aircraft, covering DO-178C and DO-254 AI assurance guidance compliance, runtime monitoring and anomaly response architecture, adversarial input stress testing methodology, multi-regulator engagement strategy with FAA and EASA, board-level AI risk reporting, and a continuous airworthiness maintenance framework.
